description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn base. The structure features a low-pitched, gable roof in a light gray color, and the exterior walls are clad in white siding. There is a covered porch with a wooden pergola and steps leading up to the main entrance, which is located on the shorter side of the building. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with several rectangular windows on the longer sides and two on the front facade. The rear of the bungalow is simple, with minimal openings and no visible porch. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, and asymmetrical window arrangement, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long white wall with three windows and the covered porch extending from the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, wooden steps, and two windows flanking the door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a long white wall, two windows, and the porch visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a simple facade with a central staircase and two windows, no porch.
